GitHubApiData.name: claudex
GitHubApiData.description: Multi-provider, multi-profile Claude Code CLI. Bring your own keys. Free models supported (Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Anthropic).

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: 多提供商、多配置文件的Claude Code命令行工具。支持自带密钥。支持免费模型（Z.ai、MiniMax、OpenRouter、DeepSeek、Moonshot、Anthropic）。
TranslatedDescriptions.ja: マルチプロバイダー、マルチプロファイル対応のClaude Code CLI。独自のキーを使用可能。無料モデル対応（Z.ai、MiniMax、OpenRouter、DeepSeek、Moonshot、Anthropic）。
TranslatedDescriptions.ko: 다중 제공자, 다중 프로필 Claude Code CLI. 직접 키를 사용하세요. 무료 모델 지원(Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Anthropic).
TranslatedDescriptions.en: Multi-provider, multi-profile Claude Code CLI. Bring your own keys. Supports free models (Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Anthropic).
TranslatedDescriptions.es: CLI de Claude Code multi-proveedor y multi-perfil. Usa tus propias claves. Modelos gratuitos compatibles (Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Anthropic).
TranslatedDescriptions.fr: CLI Claude Code multi-fournisseur, multi-profil. Apportez vos propres clés. Modèles gratuits pris en charge (Z.ai, MiniMax, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Moonshot, Anthropic).
